response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in fintech and AI-related projects, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and senior technical leadership at a scale-up.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Proven track record of scaling engineering projects
concerns: Lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture
Not enough experience in senior technical leadership at scale-ups
No clear experience in fintech infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct agentic AI experience
